prompt: Create a mockup for a veterinary clinic website with soft, pet-friendly colors, paw print navigation elements, before/after photo galleries, and an emergency contact banner
prompt_refined: Generate a web design mockup for a veterinary clinic homepage with a clean, modern aesthetic. The color palette should feature soft, pet-friendly pastels, such as muted greens, creams, and light blues. A top-level navigation bar should be visible at the header, with subtle paw print motifs integrated into the design of the navigation links or buttons. A prominent section in the main content area should be dedicated to a 'Before & After' photo gallery, showcasing pet transformations. Include a highly visible emergency contact banner, potentially positioned as a sticky header or footer, displaying essential contact information.
objects: Web design layout for a veterinary clinic homepage
